query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Haughtiness', 'The state or property of being haughty, arrogance, snobbery', 'Scholars noted a striking haughtiness between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Haughty', 'Arrogantly superior and disdainful', 'The essay highlights the haughty of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hauteur', 'Haughtiness or arrogance, loftiness', 'Scholars noted a striking hauteur between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Havoc', 'Great destruction or devastation', 'The essay highlights the havoc of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hawthorn', 'Any of various small trees having small fruits and thorns', 'Her hawthorn became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hazard', 'An unavoidable danger or risk, even though often foreseeable', 'The essay highlights the hazard of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Headstrong', 'Determined to do as one pleases, and not as others want', 'Critics argued that the plan might headstrong the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heartrend', 'That causes great grief, anguish or distress', 'Scholars noted a striking heartrend between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heathenish', 'Somewhat like a heathen', 'The essay highlights the heathenish of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heckle', 'To harass with impertinent questions or gibes', 'The essay highlights the heckle of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hedonism', 'The doctrine that pleasure or happiness is the highest good', 'The essay highlights the hedonism of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hedonist', 'A person devoted to pursuing pleasure', 'Critics argued that the plan might hedonist the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heed', 'To give careful attention to', 'Critics argued that the plan might heed the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hegemony', 'Leadership or dominance over others', 'Her hegemony became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heifer', 'A young female bovine (cow) that has not yet had a calf', 'The essay highlights the heifer of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heinous', 'Hateful, odious, abominable, totally reprehensible', 'The passage presents a heinous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hemisphere', 'Half of a sphere, often referring to the Earth’s divisions', '“The Northern Hemisphere experiences winter while the Southern Hemisphere has summer.”', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hemorrhage', 'A profuse discharge of blood from a ruptured blood vessel', 'The essay highlights the hemorrhage of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hemorrhoid', 'An abnormally enlarged vein, occurring inside the rectum', 'The essay highlights the hemorrhoid of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hence', 'As an inference from this fact, for this reason, therefore', 'Her hence became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Henchman', 'A loyal and trusted follower or subordinate', 'The essay highlights the henchman of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Henpeck', 'To nag persistently', 'Over time, the community learned to henpeck its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heptagon', 'A polygon with seven sides and seven angles', 'The essay highlights the heptagon of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heptarchy', 'Government by seven people', 'The essay highlights the heptarchy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Herbaceous', 'Of, pertaining to, or characteristic of an herb', 'The reviewer described the tone as herbaceous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Herbarium', 'A collection of dried plants or parts of plants', 'The essay highlights the herbarium of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Herbivorous', 'Feeding only on plants', 'What seemed herbivorous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Herculean', 'Requiring the great strength of a hercules, hard to perform', 'The author hoped the new policy would herculean tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hereditary', 'Passing naturally from parent to offspring through the genes', 'Over time, the community learned to hereditary its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heredity', 'Transmission of the qualities of parents to their offspring', 'Critics argued that the plan might heredity the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heresy', 'Belief contrary to accepted doctrine', 'Critics argued that the plan might heresy the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heretic', 'Anyone who does not conform to an established doctrine', 'The author hoped the new policy would heretic tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heretical', 'Of or pertaining to heresy or heretics', 'Critics argued that the plan might heretical the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heretofore', 'Up to this time; until now', 'Critics argued that the plan might heretofore the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heritage', 'An inheritance, property that may be inherited', 'Her heritage became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hermetic', 'Made airtight by fusion or sealing', 'Scholars noted a striking hermetic between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hernia', 'Disorder where a part of the body protrudes through a tear', 'Her hernia became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heroine', 'A woman of distinguished courage or ability', 'Scholars noted a striking heroine between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hesitancy', 'A pausing before beginning a task, often as a result of fear', 'The essay highlights the hesitancy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hesitant', 'Tending to hesitate, wait, or proceed with caution', 'Over time, the community learned to hesitant its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hesitation', 'A delay due to uncertainty of mind or fear', 'Her hesitation became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heterodox', 'Contrary to or differing from established beliefs or accepted doctrines', 'Critics argued that the plan might heterodox the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heterodoxy', 'The quality of being heterodox', 'Her heterodoxy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heterogeneity', 'The state of being composed from dissimilar parts', 'The essay highlights the heterogeneity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heterogeneous', 'Diverse in character or content', 'The passage presents a heterogeneous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heterogenous', 'Not uniform; varied', 'What seemed heterogenous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heteromorphic', 'Having different forms in different stages of the life cycle', 'What seemed heteromorphic at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Heuristic', 'Enabling a person to discover or learn something for themselves', '“The teacher used a heuristic approach to problem-solving.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hew', 'To strike forcibly with a cutting instrument, chop', 'Critics argued that the plan might hew the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Hexagon', 'A polygon with six sides and six angles', 'The essay highlights the hexagon of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
